creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Created attachment 256111
[PATCH] sysutils/cbsd-mq-api: update 0.4 → 0.5

Fixed version with changed maintainer email.

Hi Oleg!

Thank you for the very good CBSD project I like to use for my own virtual machines :)

I would have it fixed immediately with ease. I just didn't get it right what I'm asked about, as all maintainer changes I saw before were done exclusively by committers, so I never expected it to be me who people ask for.
